text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I join T.M. Opera O for the rehearsal<n>for her New
Year's performance,<n>which will be held at her
parents'<n>house.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: La la la! ♪Oh? Who do we have here?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Well met, Ayabe. I see my siren song<n>has lured
you here! What say you to<n>watching the rehearsal
for my New<n>Year's performance?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Huh? No.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Heh, she's merely trying not to seem<n>overeager.
After all, it's not every<n>day one can watch a
performance<n>exclusive to family members!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha ha! What a glorious day!<n>It's naught
but clear skies for this<n>year's performance, and
the entire<n>world is my stage!

text_block_list.name: Opera O's Younger Sister
text_block_list.text: Clap, clap, clap! I've been soexcited for this! Oh, and you're usingthe props I made!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Your design skills are as<n>splendid as ever!
Take that rose, for<n>example—one would hardly
think it's<n>origami.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Now then, it's almost showtime, and<n>yet...

text_block_list.name: Opera O's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Sorry I'm late, dear! I got held up at<n>work! Who
would've thought the<n>grocery store would be so
busy on<n>New Year's?

text_block_list.name: Opera O's Father
text_block_list.text:
There were crowds everywhere. It's<n>a good thing
I decided to drive over<n>and pick you up. Oh, we got
some<n>New Year's dishes and amazake as<n>well.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Mother, Father... You're right on time!Now, let's raise the curtains on thisyear's extra special New Year'shome performance! I call it Dawn ofthe Overlord!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Laaa la la la la laaa! ♪ The Overlord<n>cometh! The
Overlord goeth! ♪ The<n>new year is here! ♪

text_block_list.name: Opera O's Father
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! What a great opening<n>number! Watching
this performance<n>always motivates me to give it
my all<n>each year!

text_block_list.name: Opera O's Younger Sister
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe! The new year hasn't really<n>begun until
we've seen Opera O's<n>New Year's performance,
huh? ♪

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...What a carefree lot.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: They certainly are!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Everyone's so warm, loving,<n>overflowing with
kindness... On top of<n>that, the depth and breadth of
their<n>knowledge of the arts is vast...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Are they not a truly magnificent<n>family? Their love
nurtured and<n>shaped the Overlord. It is thanks to
them I can bathe the world in light...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Putting on this home performance is<n>my way of
expressing my love and<n>appreciation for them.
choice_data_list: It's clear how much you love your family.
It's clear how much you love your family.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Loud and clear.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hm? Oh, speak of the devil!

text_block_list.name: Opera O's Younger Sister
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Sis! It's me! Have you finished<n>packing? Are
you going to make it<n>back home in time?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Set your heart at ease, my beloved<n>little sister! All
is well. Actually,<n>you've caught me at the perfect
time.<n>I was extolling your virtues to my<n>friends!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Behold! This here is my trainer. Go<n>ahead!
Express your salutations!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And this aloof Umamusume is Admire<n>Vega! Hehe!
She's a dear and bosom<n>friend of mine!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Huh? Says who?!

text_block_list.name: Opera O's Younger Sister
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, so they're your friends?! Nice<n>to meet you
both! Thanks for keeping<n>Opera O out of trouble!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Uhhh... Well... Sure...

text_block_list.name: Opera O's Younger Sister
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, well, I'll get out of your hair.<n>I'm really
looking forward to your<n>performance this year!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Did you hear that just now?! Ayabe<n>said "sure"!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I am moved beyond words right now!<n>To think
your earnest feelings would<n>overcome your
shyness...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Hey, I was put on the spot...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Whatever...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Go out there and break a leg... for<n>your sister.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ayabe! You bashful little thing, you. I<n>accept your
encouragement with<n>open arms!
